NetSparkleUpdater.​ReleaseNotesGrabber
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​ReleaseNotesGrabber

Grabs release notes formatted as Markdown (https://​en​.wikipedia​.org​/wiki​/Markdown) from the server and allows you to view them as HTML.

Variables
_signatureVerifier
protected ISignatureVerifier? _signatureVerifier

to verify release note signatures if user desires. Not required.

_logger
protected ILogger? _logger

for logging any pertinent data to the console

MarkdownExtensions
public static readonly List<string> MarkdownExtensions

List of supported extensions for markdown files (.md, .mkdn, .mkd, .markdown)

Properties
ChecksReleaseNotesSignature
public bool ChecksReleaseNotesSignature {
get;
set
}

Whether or not to check the signature of the release notes after they've been downloaded. Defaults to false.

LoadingHTML
public string LoadingHTML {
get;
set
}

HTML to show while release notes are loading. Does NOT include ending body and html tags.

ReleaseNotesTemplate
public string ReleaseNotesTemplate {
get;
set
}

The HTML template to use for each changelog, version, etc. for every app cast item update

AdditionalHeaderHTML
public string AdditionalHeaderHTML {
get;
set
}

The HTML template to use for each changelog, version, etc. for every app cast item update

DateFormat
public string DateFormat {
get;
set
}

The DateTime.ToString() format used when formatting dates to show in the release notes header. NetSparkle is not responsible for what happens if you send a bad format! :)

InitialHTML
public string InitialHTML {
get
}

The initial HTML to use for the changelog. This is everything before the body tag and includes the html and head elements/tags. This ends with an open body tag.

LogWriter
public ILogger? LogWriter {
set;
get
}

ILogger to log data from LocalFileDownloader

Functions
ReleaseNotesGrabber
public ReleaseNotesGrabber(
string? 
releaseNotesTemplate,
string? 
htmlHeadAddition,
ISignatureVerifier? 
signatureVerifier
)

Base constructor for ReleaseNotesGrabber

Parameters
releaseNotesTemplate
string?

Template to use for separating each item in the HTML

htmlHeadAddition
string?

Any additional header information to stick in the HTML that will show up in the release notes

signatureVerifier
ISignatureVerifier?

to verify release note signatures if needed/desired

GetLoadingText
public virtual string GetLoadingText()

Generates the text to display while release notes are loading.  By default, this is InitialHTML + LoadingHTML + the ending body and html tags.

Returns

HTML to show to the user while release notes are loading

DownloadAllReleaseNotes
public virtual async Task<string> DownloadAllReleaseNotes(
List<AppCastItem> 
items,
AppCastItem 
latestVersion,
CancellationToken 
cancellationToken
)

Asynchronously download all of the release notes provided to this function and convert them to HTML

Parameters
items
List<AppCastItem>

List of items that you want to display in the release notes

latestVersion
AppCastItem

The latest version (most current version) of your releases

cancellationToken
CancellationToken

Token to cancel the async download requests

Returns

The release notes formatted as HTML and ready to display to the user

GetReleaseNotes
protected virtual async Task<string?> GetReleaseNotes(
AppCastItem 
item,
CancellationToken 
cancellationToken
)

Grab the release notes for the given item and return their release notes in HTML format so that they can be displayed to the user.

Parameters
item
AppCastItem

AppCastItemitem to download the release notes for

cancellationToken
CancellationToken

token that can be used to cancel a release notes grabbing operation

Returns

The release notes, formatted as HTML, for a given release of the software

DownloadReleaseNotes
protected virtual async Task<string> DownloadReleaseNotes(
string 
link,
CancellationToken 
cancellationToken
)

Download the release notes at the given link. Does not do anything else for the release notes (verification, display, etc.) -- just downloads the release notes and passes them back as a string.

Parameters
link
string

string URL to the release notes to download

cancellationToken
CancellationToken

token that can be used to cancel a download operation

Returns

The release notes data (file data) at the given link as a string. Typically this data is formatted as markdown.

CreateHttpClient
protected virtual HttpClient CreateHttpClient()

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads

Returns

The client used for file downloads

CreateHttpClient
protected virtual HttpClient CreateHttpClient(
HttpClientHandler? 
handler
)

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads (with nullable handler)

Parameter
handler
HttpClientHandler?

HttpClientHandler for messages

Returns

The client used for file downloads
